column6: Job description This is a full-time on-site role for a DevOps Engineer at IAMOPS | DevOps done right! in Pune and Surat. As a DevOps Engineer, you will be responsible for managing infrastructure as code (IaC), software development, continuous integration, system administration, and Linux. Your day-to-day tasks will include designing and implementing scalable infrastructure, automating deployment processes, maintaining CI/CD pipelines, optimizing system performance, and resolving incidents. Responsibilities Include Design, build, maintain and scale production services across multiple environments over cloud/onprem deployments. Cooperate with developers and 24*7 DevOps Support Team to ensure highly available and scalable production systems. Improving and enhancing our monitoring solutions. Defining methodology that supports internal teams processes. Ideal Candidates Must Have Must have 3+ years of hands-on experience (5+ years of experience is a plus). Extensive hands-on experience with multi cloud environments like AWS, Azure, GCP. Extensive hands-on experience with Kubernetes and Docker. Strong knowledge and experience with infrastructure as code (IaC) tools and principles. Proficiency in software development and scripting languages. Expertise in continuous integration (CI) and continuous deployment (CD) methodologies. System monitoring and centralised logging platforms (ELK, Grafana, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry). Extensive experience in system administration and Linux. Excellent troubleshooting and problem-solving skills. Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment. Strong communication and documentation skills. Relevant certifications in DevOps or related fields. Kind of a Team Player Passionate, curious and love to learn and explore new depths in the technology you use every day. Willing and able to meet a challenge head-on, solve problems independently and make things happen. Open minded, flexible and thrive in a highly dynamic, fast-paced, ever-changing environment. column6: Job description Platform Engineer | Qube XP Title: Platform Engineer | Qube XP Department: Product Engineering Location: Remote State: Remote Experience: Status: Hot Description Our Company Qube Cinema Technology is a pioneer in crafting end-to-end digital cinema technology and solutions. Qube Cinema's portfolio of products is powerful, flexible, reliable, cost-effective, and used in every step of the filmmaking and exhibition process. Drawing on decades of experience in the cinema business, Qube provides a seamless digital environment across the industry, from filmmakers and post-production companies to exhibitors with DCI compliant products to moviegoers. The product you'll help build Qube XP is a line of server products that power movie theatres worldwide. The XP server stores the movies, plays the shows, and interacts with various other equipment in the theatre like the audio processor, lighting systems, etc. The servers are built with custom assembled hardware and run highly customized operating systems. The team works across multiple software development paradigms, ranging from front-end web development (React), back-end (Go, C++) to OS customization (Yocto) and FPGA. Your Role As a platform engineer, you'll be developing/enhancing the custom (Linux-based) operating system that will power the next generation of Qube's XP line of playback products.
